scope: Faction main page residual labels, donation unlock line, special campaign block, and shared Faction reputation/favor info labels

verification.expectedVisualChange: Faction main page residual labels such as Back, Special Campaign, donation unlock, Purchase Augmentations, Reputation, and Favor tooltips should render in Korean where appropriate.
knownRemaining: Faction Augmentations purchase page sorting/filtering and buy-state labels are intentionally left for a separate Faction Augmentations page patch.
Faction names and gameplay terms Faction/Augmentation/BitNode are preserved.
